title: Architect gRPC Streaming Patterns
description: Implement Unary, Server-Streaming, Client-Streaming, and Bidirectional-Streaming patterns in gRPC. Architect high-throughput inter-service communication solutions using various gRPC streaming patterns.
objectives: Implement Unary, Server-Streaming, Client-Streaming, and Bidirectional-Streaming patterns in gRPC.
Architect high-throughput inter-service communication solutions using various gRPC streaming patterns.
